name: Tool Call Logger
description: Intercepts all agent tool calls and prints them to the console

logResults.description: Also log tool results after execution (default: true)

verbose.description: Include full tool parameters and results in output (default: false)

logResults.label: Log Results
logResults.help: Log tool results after execution completes

verbose.label: Verbose Output
verbose.help: Include full tool parameters and results in console output
